Variables.Name: CircleRadius
Variables.Description: max distance of path between point and context

Variables.Name: SpaceBetween
Variables.Description: items will be generated on a circle this much apart

Variables.Name: NumberOfPoints
Variables.Description: this many items will be generated on a circle

Variables.Name: PointOnCircleSpacingMethod
Variables.Description: how we are choosing where the points are in the circle

Variables.Name: ArcDirection
Variables.Description: If you generate items on a piece of circle you define direction of Arc cut here

Variables.Name: ArcAngle
Variables.Description: If you generate items on a piece of circle you define angle of Arc cut here

Variables.Name: bIgnoreAnyContextActorsWhenGeneratingCircle
Variables.Description: ignore tracing into context actors when generating the circle
